S.FORM: Jesse Branson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1942 , ryax sa tay 7 nqu tay 1, Jesse Branson, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2014) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *es~…ēs~…ēe ő≤rans~…ēon s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a. kawas~…ē taj **** , rjax s~…ēa taj * nqu taj *, *es~…ēs~…ēe ő≤rans~…ēon, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. (mńßuqil s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
